name: law firms managing 5–15 clients tool
description: For law firms managing 5–15 clients, regulatory changes cause compliance risks. We provide a compliance management system instead of manual tracking of regulatory changes.
problem_solved: Inability to keep up with regulatory changes leads to compliance risks.
